claimText: New study links Ozempic to a rare eye condition (NAION) that can cause sudden vision loss. The FDA has now added this to the drug's warnings.
People are reporting suicidal thoughts on Ozempic. The FDA is investigating but hasn't found a direct link yet. Still, patients should be aware.
Big Pharma is suing compounding pharmacies to stop affordable Ozempic alternatives. People can't afford $1000/month and now they're taking away the only option.
FDA warns compounded semaglutide may contain wrong doses or contaminants. Several patients hospitalized. These aren't the same as brand-name Ozempic.
Ozempic might help with addiction? Early studies show it reduces alcohol cravings. Researchers are calling it a potential breakthrough.
FDA just approved Wegovy for heart disease prevention, not just weight loss. This is huge - first obesity drug approved for cardiovascular outcomes.
Trump's new drug pricing plan claims to cut Ozempic costs but experts say the details don't add up. Pharma stocks barely moved.
BREAKING: Long-term data shows weight comes right back when you stop Ozempic. This isn't a cure, it's a subscription model for Big Pharma.
New research exploring semaglutide for Alzheimer's disease. The GLP-1 pathway may have neuroprotective effects. Clinical trials are enrolling now.
STEP 5 trial results: people maintained weight loss for 2 full years on semaglutide. But the real question is what happens at year 3, 5, 10?
